/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsimple_velocity_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/simple_velocity_msg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/simple_velocity_msg/msg/detail/simple_velocity__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
